message:
fix(nested): Add VM fallback analysis for nested functions

Variables used inside eval() strings within nested functions (closures)
were not being properly tracked, causing "use of undeclared identifier"
errors. For example:

  def iterate():
      res = []  # Should declare var/const
      for i in gen:
          res.append(i)  # Used in eval() string
      return res

The fix adds analyzeVMFallbackVars() calls to:
- zero_capture.zig (two locations)
- closure_gen.zig
- recursive.zig

This ensures variables referenced only in eval() strings are properly
declared instead of being discarded as "unused".
